configName.description: The config name using which the credit accelerator file generation was requested

reportId.description: Unique identifier for the credit accelerator file

selectedAccounts.description: Accounts which were selected for credit accelerator file generation.

submissionDate.description: Date on which the request to generate credit accelerator file was submitted

originalReportId.description: Report id of original report on which refresh is performed. This is not available when report is generated for the first time.

status.description: Generation status of the requested credit accelerator file requested
